subtitle: Review architecture, boundaries, diagrams, and implementation seams before coding starts.

glance_cards.label: Deltas
glance_cards.hint: Material changes since the prior approved snapshot.

glance_cards.label: Seams
glance_cards.hint: Implementation seams or handoffs called out explicitly.

glance_cards.label: Open issues
glance_cards.hint: Questions or TODO: Confirm items still active.
glance_cards.section_title: Open Questions and TODO: Confirm Items

sections.title: Architecture and Runtime Model
sections.label: Architecture
sections.why: Lead with runtime shape and visual evidence before implementation details.
sections.empty_state: Add the architecture summary that frames the design review.

sections.title: Boundaries, Interfaces, and Data Flow
sections.label: Boundaries
sections.why: Use a matrix when interface seams and data flow need side-by-side review.

sections.title: Implementation Seams and Operational Hand-Offs
sections.label: Seam
sections.why: Keep ownership seams and operational hand-offs dense and comparable.

sections.title: Major Risks and Tradeoffs
sections.label: Risk Review
sections.why: Frame design risks as explicit review checks before coding starts.

sections.title: Decisions Required for Approval
sections.label: Decision Gate
sections.why: State the architecture calls the reviewer is approving.

sections.title: Open Questions and TODO: Confirm Items
sections.label: Open Issues
sections.why: Expose unresolved seams before implementation begins.

sections.title: Traceability Map
sections.label: Evidence
sections.why: Tie substantive approval claims to exact canonical evidence.

sections.title: Validator Status
sections.label: Validation
sections.why: Show canonical and approval-view validation status together.

sections.title: Downstream Impact if Approved
sections.label: Impact
sections.why: Clarify what downstream work may now treat as fixed.

glance_cards.label: Risk checks
glance_cards.hint: Major risks or tradeoffs to confirm.

glance_cards.label: Evidence claims
glance_cards.hint: Claims backed by exact design quotes.
